title: bidens lemmonii
intro: Bidens lemmonii, also known as Lemmon's Beggar Ticks, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bidens lemmonii include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bidens lemmonii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
